'''ngafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:radiogenically|radiogenically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-f-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:radiogenically|radiogenically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || ngafate
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || ngafatesher
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || ngafatesherëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || ngafatero
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || ngafateshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || ngafateshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokingafatero
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokingafateshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokingafateshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gongafankerom
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongafankeshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongafankeshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gongafankeya
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || ngafaterom
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || ngafatemu
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || ngafateya
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokingafaterom
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokingafatemu
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokingafateya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || ngafafate
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || ngafafatesher
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || ngafafatesherëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || ngafafatero
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || ngafafateshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || ngafafateshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokingafafatero
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokingafafateshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokingafafateshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gongafafankerom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongafafankeshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongafafankeshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gongafafankeya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || ngafafaterom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || ngafafatemu
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || ngafafateya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokingafafaterom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokingafafatemu
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokingafafateya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || ngæfæte
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || ngæfætesher
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || ngæfætesherëm
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || ngæfæteshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || ngæfæteshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokingæfætero
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokingæfæteshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokingæfæteshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gongæfænkerom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongæfænkeshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongæfænkeshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gongæfænkeya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || ngæfæterom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || ngæfætemu
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || ngæfæteya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokingæfæterom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokingæfætemu
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokingæfæteya
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || ngaffafte
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || ngaffaftesher
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || ngaffaftesherëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || ngaffaftero
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || ngaffafteshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || ngaffafteshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokingaffaftero
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokingaffafteshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokingaffafteshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gongaffafnkerom
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongaffafnkeshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongaffafnkeshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gongaffafnkeya
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || ngaffafterom
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || ngaffaftemu
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || ngaffafteya
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokingaffafterom
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokingaffaftemu
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokingaffafteya
|}

''76 forms generated.''
